issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path.

scenarios.name: passive-json-enum
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric by providing the exact amass command, specifying the JSON output file, and listing the first ten subdomains, whereas Response A omits the actual subdomain list.

scenarios.name: visual-network-graph
scenarios.rationale: Response B is closer to the rubric, using the correct amass viz command, whereas Response A uses the wrong command and output names.
